message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
title Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten

package "NSheets Client" {
  boundary HomeView
  control HomePresenter
}

rectangle Server {
  entity NoteServices
  controller ListNoteController
  class NoteService
  object NoteRepository
}

database Database

actor User

User -> HomePresenter : onReveal() / navigate to page
HomePresenter -> NoteServices : getNotes()
activate NoteServices
NoteServices -> ListNoteController : listNotes()
ListNoteController -> NoteService : allNotes()
NoteService -> NoteRepository : findAll()
NoteRepository --> Database : fetch
Database -[#green]>-#10; #red> NoteRepository 
deactivate NoteServices
return onSuccess()
note right of HomePresenter: setContents()
@enduml
